crossRefs.label: If there is no communication, check the data link circuit.
Fuel and emission control system Learning

blocks.text: Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat. Turn ignition to ON mode. Verify that HDS communicates with the vehicle and the PGM-FI ECU. If there is no communication, check the data link circuit.

refs.label: If there is no communication, check the data link circuit.

blocks.text: Select "AT" from the "System Selection Menu" in HDS. Select "AT Control Unit Reset" from the "Test Mode Menu" to reset the PGM-FI ECU. Turn ignition OFF (LOCK) mode. Turn ignition to ON mode and wait for 30 seconds. Turn the ignition to the OFF (LOCK) mode and remove the HDS.

items: Work shall be performed with the engine stopped.

blocks.text: 3. Fuel and emission control system Learning
